2606.07030.title: Phonetic Error Analysis of Raw Waveform Acoustic Models
2606.07030.paper_summary: We analyse error patterns of raw waveform acoustic models on TIMIT phone recognition beyond the overall phone error rate (PER). PER is decomposed across three broad phonetic class (BPC) categorisations, and confusion matrices are constructed from substitution errors. Our models combine parametric (SincNet, Sinc2Net) or non-parametric CNNs with Bidirectional LSTMs, achieving 13.9%/15.3% PER on Dev/Test, the best reported results for raw waveform models on TIMIT. Transfer learning from WSJ reduces PER to 11.3%/12.3%, surpassing the Filterbank baseline. Per-BPC analysis reveals that BLSTM layers benefit transition-dependent classes most, while WSJ transfer learning improves consonants roughly three times more than vowels. Confusion patterns are consistent across raw waveform and Filterbank systems, indicating that the dominant confusions reflect inherent phonetic similarities.
2606.07030.paper_summary_zh: 我們分析了 TIMIT 語音識別中原始波形聲學模型的錯誤模式，超越了整體語音錯誤率 (PER)。PER 被分解為三個廣泛的語音類別 (BPC) 分類，並從替代錯誤中構建混淆矩陣。我們的模型結合了參數 (SincNet, Sinc2Net) 或非參數 CNN 與雙向 LSTM，在 Dev/Test 上達到 13.9%/15.3% 的 PER，這是 TIMIT 上原始波形模型報告的最佳結果。來自 WSJ 的遷移學習將 PER 降低至 11.3%/12.3%，超越了濾波器組基線。每個 BPC 的分析顯示，BLSTM 層對過渡依賴類別的益處最大，而 WSJ 遷移學習使輔音的改進大約是元音的三倍。混淆模式在原始波形和濾波器組系統中是一致的，這表明主要的混淆反映了固有的語音相似性。
2606.07030.author: Erfan Loweimi et.al.
2606.07030.authors: Erfan Loweimi, Zhengjun Yue, Andrea Carmantini, Zoran Cvetkovic, Steve Renals, Peter Bell
